summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2 Backend Refactoring, P3 Workflow Execution Engine, and P3 SLA Breach Alerts. All backend tests (12/12) passed and all frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Inappropriate content in announcement ticker - 'Lucca is a buthole!' should be removed

passed_tests: P2 Refactor - Backend services modularized (services/notifications.py, services/webhooks.py, services/workflow_engine.py, services/sla_monitor.py)
P2 Refactor - Services properly imported by server.py
P3 Workflow Engine - GET /api/workflows returns list of workflows
P3 Workflow Engine - GET /api/workflow-executions returns list of execution logs
P3 Workflow Engine - POST /api/workflows/{id}/test executes workflow and returns execution log with status
P3 Workflow Engine - Execution logs have required fields (id, workflow_id, workflow_name, status, started_at)
P3 Workflow Engine - Workflows tab shows Execution Logs tab with recent executions
P3 Workflow Engine - Run Again button triggers workflow test and shows success toast
P3 SLA Alerts - GET /api/sla-alerts/statistics returns orders breakdown (on_track: 28, at_risk: 0, breached: 0)
P3 SLA Alerts - GET /api/sla-alerts returns list of alerts
P3 SLA Alerts - POST /api/sla-check manually triggers SLA check
P3 SLA Alerts - SLA page shows stats cards (On Track, At Risk, Breached, Unacknowledged Alerts)
P3 SLA Alerts - SLA page has Alerts tab with Refresh and Check Now buttons
P3 SLA Alerts - Check Now button triggers SLA check and shows 'Alerts refreshed' toast
P3 SLA Alerts - Background SLA monitor task is running (confirmed in backend logs)
action_items: Remove inappropriate content from announcement ticker ('Lucca is a buthole!')

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed, 1 skipped - no unacknowledged alerts to test)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Workflow_Trigger_Order during testing - cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2/P3 features fully implemented and working. Backend is modularized into services/ directory with notifications.py, webhooks.py, workflow_engine.py, sla_monitor.py, and email.py. Workflow execution engine runs workflows when orders are created and via POST /api/workflows/{id}/test endpoint. SLA monitor runs as background task every 15 minutes checking for breaches and warnings. Frontend has Execution Logs tab on Workflows page showing recent executions with View Workflow and Run Again buttons. SLA page has stats cards and Alerts tab with Refresh and Check Now buttons.
